LightningComponentBundle.description: Related list component for Party Consents

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record ID
property.description: The ID of the parent record (Account ID).

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: SLDS icon name to display next to the related list title. Use standard Salesforce icon format (e.g., 'standard:account', 'standard:case', 'custom:custom1'). Refer to Salesforce Lightning Design System icons for available options.

property.name: relatedListTitle
property.label: Title
property.description: The display title shown at the top of the related list component. This appears as the heading for the related records table (e.g., 'Party Consents', 'Related Cases', 'Opportunities').

property.name: childObjectApiName
property.label: Child Object API Name
property.description: The API name of the child object whose records will be displayed in the related list. Use the exact API name as it appears in Setup.

property.name: relationshipField
property.label: Lookup Field to Parent
property.description: The API name of the lookup/master-detail field on the child object that relates to the parent object.

property.name: columnLabels
property.label: Column Labels
property.default: Name, Data Use Purpose, Consent Capture Date Time, Effective From, Effective To
property.description: Comma-separated list of display labels for the datatable columns. Must match the order of Fields property. Example: If Fields is 'Name, DataUsePurpose.Name, CaptureDate', then Column Labels could be 'Consent Name, Data Use Purpose, Capture Date'.

property.name: fieldNames
property.label: Fields
property.description: Comma-separated list of field API names to display as columns in the datatable. You can include standard fields, custom fields, and parent lookup fields using dot notation. Examples: 'Name, CreatedDate, Status__c' or 'Name, DataUsePurpose.Name, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo'. The order must match the Column Labels property.

property.name: sortedBy
property.label: Sort Field
property.description: The API name of the field to use for default sorting of the related records. The records will be sorted by this field using the Sort Direction specified.

property.name: sortDirection
property.label: Sort Direction
property.description: The direction to sort the records by the Sort Field. Select 'asc' for ascending order (A-Z, oldest to newest) or 'desc' for descending order (Z-A, newest to oldest). Default is 'asc'.

property.name: recordLimit
property.label: Number of Records
property.description: Maximum number of records to retrieve and display in the related list. Enter a positive integer value. The component will fetch up to this many records from the database. Default is 5.

property.name: typeFilter
property.label: Party Consent Type
property.description: Comma-separated list of Type__c picklist values to filter records. Only records matching these Type values will be displayed. Example: 'Virtual Training, Group Training'.
